message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Adding fallback_searchpath param to FileSystemLoader in loaders.py. What file(s) does your feature touch? If also loaders.py we need to split by method or sequence edits carefully.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: My task: add optional path_transform param to all loader classes in loaders.py (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). This is the only file I need to touch. Please tell me what file(s) you need so we can figure out how to split loaders.py if you also need it.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: We both need loaders.py so full disjointness isn't possible here. I'll scope my edits strictly to FileSystemLoader: adding a new fallback_searchpath param in __init__, extending get_source() to fall back to it, and list_templates() to include its templates. I won't touch DictLoader/FunctionLoader/PackageLoader/PrefixLoader/ChoiceLoader. Go ahead and add path_transform wherever you need, including FileSystemLoader - just know I'm adding fallback_searchpath there too, so if you touch FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source/list_templates signatures, keep my new param/logic intact. Proceeding to implement now.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: We both need loaders.py so true file-disjointness isn't possible. Propose serializing instead: you go first since your change is scoped to FileSystemLoader only (add fallback_searchpath to __init__ and get_source). Send DONE when finished. I'll then add path_transform across all loader classes (BaseLoader-level param on each __init__, applied in each get_source before resolution), and will be careful to preserve your fallback_searchpath additions when I touch FileSystemLoader. Sound OK? Reply ACCEPT if so, or REVISE if you'd rather go second.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Agreed, I'll go first and send DONE when finished implementing fallback_searchpath in FileSystemLoader.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Agreed. Proceeding to add path_transform now; will read current file state first and preserve your fallback_searchpath additions if already present.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Finished adding fallback_searchpath to FileSystemLoader (__init__, get_source, list_templates). Tests pass (tests/test_loader.py, 40 passed). Patch written to patch.txt. Go ahead and add path_transform now - just preserve the fallback_searchpath param/logic in FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source/list_templates when you touch them.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Finished adding path_transform to all loader classes (FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). Applied at top level for PrefixLoader/ChoiceLoader before delegating to children. TemplateNotFound errors report the original untransformed name. All 841 tests pass, no regressions. FYI: it looks like we're each working in isolated copies of the repo (I don't see your fallback_searchpath changes in my file), so no actual clobbering occurred - each of us will submit our own patch.txt independently.
